title: NoChatReports (Spigot/Paper)
description: Block and disable chat reporting on Minecraft Servers - Bukkit, Spigot, Paper, Purpur & Folia - 1.19-26.1
body:
![main logo](https://i.imgur.com/LdlLtVH.png "main logo")


# NoChatReports (Spigot/Paper/Folia)
Block chat reporting on your spigot/paper/folia server.  
Not affiliated with the 'No Chat Reports' client mod.

## Description
This is a plugin which blocks the ability of reporting chat messages and /msg messages in 1.19 to 26.1. It also prevents the annoying insecure server pop-up when players join. The plugin is plug-and-play: you do not need to edit the config at all for it to work. It is instead recommended to leave the default settings unless you know what you are doing since the defaults are the most stable settings.

## Features
✓ This plugin will simply work out of the box, no config required  
✓ Blocks chat reporting  
✓ Block /msg reporting  
✓ Blocks insecure server pop-up notifications  
✓ Packet based  

## Contact
If there is any **issues**, **bugs** or **feature requests** please head over to https://discord.gg/h7qJ9gRCwj to ~~yell at~~ chat with me.
